title: Linux local model runtime validation
blocker_detail: local-stt and local-mt features compile successfully on ubuntu-22.04 in CI matrix (see ci.yml linux-local-stt and linux-local-mt allowed-fail jobs). However, runtime model loading, ldd verification of libonnxruntime.so, XDG model cache path creation, and CPU baseline benchmarks require model files and Linux hardware — not available in CI.

compilation_status.local_stt_ubuntu2204: CI allowed-fail job passes (linux-local-stt in ci.yml)
compilation_status.local_mt_ubuntu2204: CI allowed-fail job passes (linux-local-mt in ci.yml)

deferred_test_cases.description: cargo test --features local-stt and local-mt pass on Linux
deferred_test_cases.evidence: Build passes; unit tests that don't require model files pass in CI

deferred_test_cases.description: RTF <= agreed baseline for tiny/base model
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires model download and CPU measurement

deferred_test_cases.description: ldd shows expected libonnxruntime.so with correct symbol version
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires runtime execution with ORT loaded

deferred_test_cases.description: Model cache under XDG_DATA_HOME created and hash-verified
deferred_test_cases.reason: Requires model download and filesystem write in test environment

deferred_test_cases.description: No silent remote fallback when local model present
deferred_test_cases.evidence: MtRouter unit tests in src/providers/mt/router.rs verify the no-silent-cloud invariant: 'key_presence_alone_does_not_enable_cloud' and 'unsupported_pair_without_fallback_returns_invalid_input_no_calls'. Runtime integration with actual model files deferred to hardware.
deferred_test_cases.deferred_reason: Runtime integration path (LocalOpusMtProvider + MtRouter with real ONNX) requires model files

deferred_test_cases.evidence: Deferred to Phase 6 per docs/adr/. CPU-only is Phase 5 baseline.

packaging_notes.dynamic_library_recipe: libonnxruntime.so must be bundled or required as a system package (cargo-deb recommends section); see docs/07-packaging-verification.md
packaging_notes.whisper_cpp_so: whisper-rs bundles libwhisper.a statically; no extra .so needed

prerequisites: Linux machine (x86_64) with ONNX Runtime system library or bundled .so

notes: Compilation and unit test gates pass via CI. Runtime and packaging validation deferred to hardware access. GPU is explicitly out of scope for Phase 5.
